about.title: About 3V
about.subtitle: A spiritual sanctuary, a luminous beacon guiding souls in a world searching for meaning
about.missionP1: Founded on January 1, 2024, the Way, Truth, Life (3V) association is much more than a simple organization: it is a spiritual sanctuary, a luminous beacon guiding young people in a world searching for meaning.
about.missionP2: Rooted in the timeless principles of the Christian faith, 3V stands as a bulwark against the storms of moral decay, with particular emphasis on the spiritual and moral well-being of youth.
about.missionP3: Our approach combines biblical wisdom with modern activities, meaningful discussions and spiritual resources to help everyone find their path to a more fulfilling life centered on eternal values.
about.mainVerse: "I am the way, the truth, and the life. No one comes to the Father except through me."
about.obj1: Offer a spiritual and moral refuge to young people facing the challenges of modern society
about.obj2: Educate and raise awareness about the Christian faith and its principles
about.obj3: Create a caring community of mutual help and spiritual support
about.obj4: Promote a healthy and balanced lifestyle based on Gospel values
about.obj5: Train Christian leaders as agents of transformation in their communities
about.obj6: Establish partnerships with religious and community organizations
about.offerReadingsDesc: A structured 354-day program for progressive immersion in the Holy Scriptures.
about.offerLentDesc: A period of reflection, meditation and prayer to deepen your faith.
about.offerStationsDesc: A meditation on Christ's sacrifice and the path of salvation.
about.offerCommunityDesc: Meetings, workshops and events to grow together spiritually.
about.offerPrayerDesc: A space for sharing prayer intentions and mutual support.
about.offerResourcesDesc: Galleries, guides and materials to deepen your understanding of faith.
about.timeline2024aDesc: Creation of a spiritual sanctuary dedicated to youth
about.timeline2024bDesc: Launch of conferences, workshops and community activities
about.timeline2025Desc: Annual cycle of 354 days of spiritual meditations

install.step1Desc: Open this site in Safari (iPhone) or Chrome (Android)
install.step2Desc: iPhone: Tap the Share button then "Add to Home Screen". Android: Menu → "Install app"

prayers.prayer1: Lord, bless {{name}} this day. Grant them your peace, light their path and fill their heart with joy. Amen.
prayers.prayer2: Heavenly Father, watch over {{name}}. Give them the strength to face this day and the wisdom to follow your will. Amen.
prayers.prayer3: Holy Spirit, accompany {{name}} at every moment. May your light dispel their doubts and your love strengthen them. Amen.
prayers.prayer4: Lord Jesus, take {{name}} by the hand today. May every step be guided by your grace and every word inspired by your Spirit. Amen.
prayers.prayer5: God of love, surround {{name}} with your protection. May this day be filled with blessings and moments of grace. Amen.
prayers.prayer6: Mary, Mother of God, intercede for {{name}}. Cover them with your maternal mantle and lead them to your Son. Amen.
prayers.prayer7: Lord, may {{name}} feel your presence today. Strengthen their faith, revive their hope and set their heart ablaze with love. Amen.
